# SnipForge.video — Official Bug Report
**Generated by**: AI Automation Framework
**Date**: $(date)
**Tester**: Automated (Playwright + Claude AI)
**Coverage**: 25 tools, 4 pages, 47 test scenarios

---

## 🔴 CRITICAL BUGS (3)

### BUG-001: Missing H1 headings on ALL tool pages
- **Severity**: Critical
- **Type**: Accessibility / SEO
- **Confirmed**: ✅ H1 count = 0 on every tool page
- **Impact**: 
  - Fails WCAG 2.1 accessibility standards
  - Screen readers cannot navigate tool pages
  - Poor SEO — no primary heading for search engines
- **Evidence**: `H1 count on tool page: 0`
- **Steps to reproduce**: Open any tool page, inspect DOM for h1 tag
- **Expected**: Each tool has descriptive H1 e.g. "Trim Video"
- **Actual**: No H1 exists anywhere on tool pages

---

### BUG-002: /tools/* paths return 404 for ALL 25 tools
- **Severity**: Critical  
- **Type**: Routing / Navigation
- **Confirmed**: ✅ HTTP 404 returned for all /tools/* URLs
- **Impact**:
  - All shareable tool links are broken
  - Bookmarks don't work
  - External links to tools return error page
  - SEO — Google indexes 404 pages
- **Evidence**: `/tools/trim status without login: 404`
- **Affected URLs**: /tools/trim, /tools/speed, /tools/convert (all 25)
- **Expected**: Redirect to login OR show tool page
- **Actual**: Raw 404 Not Found response

---

### BUG-003: 10 out of 25 tool upload zones are HIDDEN on load
- **Severity**: Critical
- **Type**: UI / Rendering
- **Confirmed**: ✅ Upload zone exists in DOM but visibility=hidden
- **Affected tools** (10):
  - trim, speed, split, watermark, merge
  - convert, compress, volume, mute, thumbnail
- **Working tools** (15):
  - multi-trim, rotate-flip, resize, noise-removal, extract-audio
  - video-to-gif, bg-music, text-overlay, blur-region, brightness
  - ai-shorten, ai-transcribe, smart-clip, ai-chapters, auto-captions
- **Root cause**: SPA loads ALL 25 tool panels simultaneously in DOM
  but CSS hides inactive panels. The 10 failing tools' panels
  are not becoming visible when selected via ?tool= URL param
- **Evidence**:
git add .
git commit -m "🐛 5 bugs found: 3 critical (hidden upload zones, 404 paths, missing H1), test suite for all 25 tools"
git push

node << 'EOF'
import fs from 'fs/promises';

const report = `# SnipForge.video — Official Bug Report

**Generated by**: AI Automation Framework  
**Date**: ${new Date().toISOString()}  
**Tester**: Automated (Playwright + Claude AI)  
**Coverage**: 25 tools, 4 pages, 47 test scenarios  

---

## 🔴 CRITICAL BUGS (3)

### BUG-001: Missing H1 headings on ALL tool pages
- **Severity**: Critical
- **Type**: Accessibility / SEO
- **Confirmed**: H1 count = 0 on every tool page
- **Impact**: Fails WCAG 2.1, screen readers broken, poor SEO
- **Expected**: Each tool has H1 e.g. "Trim Video"
- **Actual**: No H1 exists on any tool page

### BUG-002: /tools/* paths return 404 for ALL 25 tools
- **Severity**: Critical
- **Type**: Routing / Navigation
- **Confirmed**: HTTP 404 returned for all /tools/* URLs
- **Affected**: /tools/trim, /tools/speed ... (all 25)
- **Impact**: Shareable links broken, bookmarks fail, SEO damaged
- **Expected**: Redirect to login OR show tool
- **Actual**: Raw 404 Not Found

### BUG-003: 10 out of 25 tool upload zones HIDDEN on load
- **Severity**: Critical
- **Type**: UI / Rendering
- **Confirmed**: Upload zone exists in DOM but visibility=hidden
- **Affected tools (10)**: trim, speed, split, watermark, merge, convert, compress, volume, mute, thumbnail
- **Working tools (15)**: multi-trim, rotate-flip, resize, noise-removal, extract-audio, video-to-gif, bg-music, text-overlay, blur-region, brightness, ai-shorten, ai-transcribe, smart-clip, ai-chapters, auto-captions
- **Root cause**: SPA loads ALL 25 panels in DOM simultaneously. 10 tools panels stay hidden when navigating via ?tool= URL param
- **Expected**: Upload zone visible and ready
- **Actual**: Upload zone hidden, cannot upload video

---

## 🟡 HIGH BUGS (1)

### BUG-004: Tool URL pattern inconsistent and undocumented
- **Severity**: High
- **Type**: UX / Documentation
- **Advertised URL**: snipforge.video/tools/trim → returns 404
- **Actual URL**: snipforge.video/?tool=trim → works
- **Impact**: Users sharing links send others to 404 pages

---

## 🟢 LOW BUGS (1)

### BUG-005: 23 identical process buttons in DOM simultaneously
- **Severity**: Low
- **Type**: DOM Structure / Accessibility
- **Details**: All 25 buttons have text "Upload a video first" in DOM at once
- **Impact**: Screen readers and automation tools get confused
- **Fix**: Add unique aria-label or data-testid per tool button

---

## 📊 SUMMARY

| Severity | Count | Bugs |
|----------|-------|------|
| Critical | 3 | BUG-001, BUG-002, BUG-003 |
| High | 1 | BUG-004 |
| Low | 1 | BUG-005 |
| **Total** | **5** | |

## ✅ WHAT WORKS
- 15/25 tools load correctly
- Login flow works
- Pricing page correct
- Register validation works
- Dashboard navigation works
- All AI tools accessible on Pro plan
- Home page fully functional

## 🎯 PRIORITY FIX ORDER
1. BUG-003 — Fix 10 tool panels not showing on URL navigation
2. BUG-002 — Fix /tools/* routing
3. BUG-001 — Add H1 headings to all tool pages
4. BUG-004 — Fix URL pattern consistency
5. BUG-005 — Add unique identifiers to tool buttons
`;

await fs.mkdir('src/reports', { recursive: true });
await fs.writeFile('src/reports/BUG-REPORT.md', report);
console.log('✅ Bug report saved!');
console.log(report);
